summary: Comprehensive testing of the Unified Flash Promotion System for Trend Syria e-commerce app. All backend APIs passed (24/25 tests). Frontend UI verified for homepage Flash banner, seller Flash tab, and admin Flash settings.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Flash system is fully functional. Flash is currently LIVE (ends ~7 hours from test time). Admin settings include flash_start_hour (13 = 1:00 PM) and flash_duration_hours (24). Seller can see active promotions with countdown timers. Homepage shows Flash banner with live countdown.

backend_apis.GET /api/flash/status: PASS - Returns live/upcoming status with countdown
backend_apis.POST /api/seller/promote-product: PASS - Requires auth, validates discount, checks wallet
backend_apis.GET /api/promoted-products: PASS - Returns only products where starts_at <= now
backend_apis.PUT /api/admin/promotions/settings: PASS - Admin can update flash_start_hour and flash_duration_hours
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/promotions/all: PASS - Returns active/expired lists with stats

frontend_ui.homepage_flash_banner: PASS - Shows 'Flash نشط الآن!' with countdown timer
frontend_ui.homepage_flash_products: PASS - Shows products with -25% discount badges and crossed-out original prices
frontend_ui.seller_flash_tab: PASS - Shows Flash status, wallet balance, promotion cost (1,000 SYP), active promotions (6)
frontend_ui.admin_flash_settings: PASS - Shows stats (8 active, 0 expired, 8,000 SYP revenue), settings button, promotions list
